findings.description: Section s2 (処理済みリクエストの受信防止) is missing property names from the @OnDoubleSubmission annotation attribute table and the BasicDoubleSubmissionHandler property table. Both tables have `path`, `messageId`, `statusCode` as first-column entries that should appear in hints per V4 rules.
findings.source_evidence: @OnDoubleSubmission table: path, messageId, statusCode. BasicDoubleSubmissionHandler property table: path, messageId, statusCode.
